structured.name: Stop Transaction options
structured.objective: To inform the CSMS that a transaction at the Charging Station has stopped.
structured.description:
This use case describes the different moments a Charging Station can stop a transaction (send
TransactionEventRequest (eventType = Ended), depending on the configuration of the Charging
Station.
scenario: 1. The Charging Stations parking bay occupancy detector stops detecting the EV.

2. The Charging Station sends a TransactionEventRequest (eventType = Ended) notifying the
CSMS about a transaction that has ended.

3. The CSMS responds with a TransactionEventResponse, confirming that the
TransactionEventRequest was received.
structured.prerequisites:
A transaction is ongoing.
Configuration Variable: TxStopPoint contains: ParkingBayOccupancy
structured.postconditions:
Successful postcondition:
The transaction is ended and the CSMS is Successfully informed.
Failure postcondition:
The transaction is still ongoing. or
The CSMS is not informed.

requirements.precondition:
TxStopPoint contains:
ParkingBayOccupancy
AND
Parking Bay Detector no longer detects the
"EV"
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL stop the transaction and send a
TransactionEventRequest (eventType = Ended) to the CSMS.

requirements.precondition:
TxStopPoint contains: EVConnected
AND
Connection between Charging Station and
EV is lost.
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL stop the transaction and send a
TransactionEventRequest (eventType = Ended) to the CSMS.

requirements.precondition:
TxStopPoint contains: Authorized
AND
EV Driver is authorized to stop a
transaction.
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL stop the transaction and send a
TransactionEventRequest (eventType = Ended) to the CSMS.

requirements.precondition:
TxStopPoint contains: Authorized
AND
CSMS returns a non-valid idTokenInfo in a
TransactionEventResponse
requirements.definition: See use case E05 - Start Transaction - Id not Accepted,

requirements.precondition:
TxStopPoint contains:
PowerPathClosed
AND (
Connection between Charging Station and
EV is lost
OR
Authorization has ended or idToken is
deauthorized )
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL stop the transaction and send a
TransactionEventRequest (eventType = Ended) to the CSMS.

requirements.precondition:
TxStopPoint contains: EnergyTransfer
AND
Energy transfer stops
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL stop the transaction and send a
TransactionEventRequest (eventType = Ended) to the CSMS.

requirements.precondition:
If a transaction is not ended by the EV
Driver at the Charging Station
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL include the stoppedReason element in the
TransactionEventRequest(eventType = Ended). What reason to use is
described in the description of reasonEnumType.

requirements.precondition:
If a transaction is ended by the EV Driver at
the Charging Station (e.g. EV Driver
presented IdToken to stop the transaction)
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station MAY omit the stoppedReason element in the
TransactionEventRequest (eventType = Ended) (hence the CSMS can
interpret the reason as local when omitted).

requirements.precondition:
As part of the normal transaction
termination.
requirements.definition: The Charging Station SHALL unlock the cable (if not permanently attached).

requirements.precondition:
When configured to send meter data in the
TransactionEventRequest (eventType =
Ended), See: Meter Values - Configuration
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL add the configured measurands to the
optional meterValue field with context = Transaction.End in the
TransactionEventRequest(eventType = Ended) sent to the CSMS to provide
more details about transaction usage.

requirements.precondition:
E06.FR.11
AND
The Charging Station is running low on
memory
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station MAY drop meter data in the
TransactionEventRequest(eventType = Ended) message.

When dropping meter data, the Charging Station SHALL drop intermediate
values first (2nd value, 4th value, 6th etc), not drop the start and end values
from the list.

requirements.precondition:
When a TransactionEventRequest has to
be created
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL set the message’s seqNo field as specified in
Sequence Number Generation. (Same as E01.FR.07)

The Charging Station SHALL set the triggerReason to inform the CSMS
about what triggered the event. What reason to use is described in the
description of TriggerReasonEnumType. (Same as E01.FR.15)

requirements.precondition:
A transaction was stopped by an
Abnormal Error or Fault Condition.
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL send TransactionEventRequest(eventType =
Ended, triggerReason=AbnormalCondition) to the CSMS.

sub_scenarios.objective:
Stop a transaction when communication between the Charging Station and the EV is lost. (for
example: cable unplugged)
steps: 1. Communication between Charging Station and the EV is lost (Charging cable is unplugged).

2. If charging cable unplugged on the Charging Station side: send StatusNotificationRequest to
the CSMS to inform it about a Connector that became Available.

3. The Charging Station sends a TransactionEventRequest (eventType = Ended) notifying the
CSMS about a transaction that has ended.

4. The CSMS responds with a TransactionEventResponse, confirming that the
TransactionEventRequest was received.
sub_scenarios.prerequisites:
A transaction is ongoing.
Configuration Variable: TxStopPoint contains: EVConnected

sub_scenarios.objective: Stop a transaction when the driver is no longer authorized.
steps: 1. The Charging Station sends a TransactionEventRequest to the CSMS.
2. An invalid IdToken is received in a TransactionEventResponse.

3. The Charging Station sends a TransactionEventRequest (eventType = Ended) notifying the
CSMS about a transaction that has ended.

4. The CSMS responds with a TransactionEventResponse, confirming that the
TransactionEventRequest was received.
sub_scenarios.prerequisites:
A transaction is ongoing.
Configuration Variable: TxStopPoint contains: Authorized
sub_scenarios.postconditions:
Successful postcondition:
The transaction is ended and the CSMS is Successfully informed.
Failure postcondition:
The transaction is still ongoing. or
The CSMS is not informed.

sub_scenarios.objective: Stop a transaction when the EV driver is no longer authorized and/or the EV is disconnected.
steps: 1. The Charging Station is disconnected from EV and/or the EV driver is no longer authorized.

2. The Charging Station sends a TransactionEventRequest (eventType = Ended) notifying the
CSMS about a transaction that has ended.

3. The CSMS responds with a TransactionEventResponse, confirming that the
TransactionEventRequest was received.
sub_scenarios.prerequisites:
A transaction is ongoing.
Configuration Variable: TxStopPoint contains: PowerPathClosed
sub_scenarios.postconditions:
Successful postcondition:
The transaction is ended and the CSMS is Successfully informed.
Failure postcondition:
The transaction is still ongoing. or
The CSMS is not informed.

sub_scenarios.objective:
Stop a transaction when energy transfer stops. This will also mean the transaction stops when
the EV stops taking energy, for example when the battery is too hot.
steps:
1. The energy transfer between EV and the Charging Station stops (for example: EV stops
charging).

2. The Charging Station sends a TransactionEventRequest (eventType = Ended) notifying the
CSMS about a transaction that has ended.

3. The CSMS responds with a TransactionEventResponse, confirming that the
TransactionEventRequest was received.
sub_scenarios.prerequisites:
A transaction is ongoing.
Configuration Variable: TxStopPoint contains: EnergyTransfer
sub_scenarios.postconditions:
Successful postcondition:
The transaction is ended and the CSMS is Successfully informed.
Failure postcondition:
The transaction is still ongoing. or
The CSMS is not informed.

sub_scenarios.objective: Stop a transaction when EV driver ends authorization
steps: 1. The EV drivers presents an IdToken to end the charging.

2. The Charging Station sends a TransactionEventRequest (eventType = Ended) notifying the
CSMS about a transaction that has ended.

3. The CSMS responds with a TransactionEventResponse, confirming that the
TransactionEventRequest was received.
sub_scenarios.prerequisites:
A transaction is ongoing.
Configuration Variable: TxStopPoint contains: Authorized (or PowerPathClosed).
sub_scenarios.postconditions:
Successful postcondition:
The transaction is ended and the CSMS is Successfully informed.
Failure postcondition:
The transaction is still ongoing. or
The CSMS is not informed.

chunks.content:
# E06 - Stop Transaction options

**Objective:** To inform the CSMS that a transaction at the Charging Station has stopped.

**Description:** This use case describes the different moments a Charging Station can stop a transaction (send
TransactionEventRequest (eventType = Ended), depending on the configuration of the Charging
Station.

**Actors:** Charging Station, CSMS, EV Driver

**Scenario:**
1. The Charging Stations parking bay occupancy detector stops detecting the EV.
2. The Charging Station sends a TransactionEventRequest (eventType = Ended) notifying the
CSMS about a transaction that has ended.
3. The CSMS responds with a TransactionEventResponse, confirming that the
TransactionEventRequest was received.

**Prerequisites:** A transaction is ongoing.
Configuration Variable: TxStopPoint contains: ParkingBayOccupancy

**Postconditions:** Successful postcondition:
The transaction is ended and the CSMS is Successfully informed.
Failure postcondition:
The transaction is still ongoing. or
The CSMS is not informed.

# E06 - Requirements

**E06.FR.01**
Precondition: TxStopPoint contains:
ParkingBayOccupancy
AND
Parking Bay Detector no longer detects the
"EV"
The Charging Station SHALL stop the transaction and send a
TransactionEventRequest (eventType = Ended) to the CSMS.

**E06.FR.02**
Precondition: TxStopPoint contains: EVConnected
AND
Connection between Charging Station and
EV is lost.
The Charging Station SHALL stop the transaction and send a
TransactionEventRequest (eventType = Ended) to the CSMS.

**E06.FR.03**
Precondition: TxStopPoint contains: Authorized
AND
EV Driver is authorized to stop a
transaction.
The Charging Station SHALL stop the transaction and send a
TransactionEventRequest (eventType = Ended) to the CSMS.

**E06.FR.04**
Precondition: TxStopPoint contains: Authorized
AND
CSMS returns a non-valid idTokenInfo in a
TransactionEventResponse
See use case E05 - Start Transaction - Id not Accepted,

**E06.FR.06**
Precondition: TxStopPoint contains:
PowerPathClosed
AND (
Connection between Charging Station and
EV is lost
OR
Authorization has ended or idToken is
deauthorized )
The Charging Station SHALL stop the transaction and send a
TransactionEventRequest (eventType = Ended) to the CSMS.

**E06.FR.07**
Precondition: TxStopPoint contains: EnergyTransfer
AND
Energy transfer stops
The Charging Station SHALL stop the transaction and send a
TransactionEventRequest (eventType = Ended) to the CSMS.

**E06.FR.08**
Precondition: If a transaction is not ended by the EV
Driver at the Charging Station
The Charging Station SHALL include the stoppedReason element in the
TransactionEventRequest(eventType = Ended). What reason to use is
described in the description of reasonEnumType.

**E06.FR.09**
Precondition: If a transaction is ended by the EV Driver at
the Charging Station (e.g. EV Driver
presented IdToken to stop the transaction)
The Charging Station MAY omit the stoppedReason element in the
TransactionEventRequest (eventType = Ended) (hence the CSMS can
interpret the reason as local when omitted).

**E06.FR.10**
Precondition: As part of the normal transaction
termination.
The Charging Station SHALL unlock the cable (if not permanently attached).

# E06 - Requirements (continued)

**E06.FR.11**
Precondition: When configured to send meter data in the
TransactionEventRequest (eventType =
Ended), See: Meter Values - Configuration
The Charging Station SHALL add the configured measurands to the
optional meterValue field with context = Transaction.End in the
TransactionEventRequest(eventType = Ended) sent to the CSMS to provide
more details about transaction usage.

**E06.FR.12**
Precondition: E06.FR.11
AND
The Charging Station is running low on
memory
The Charging Station MAY drop meter data in the
TransactionEventRequest(eventType = Ended) message.

**E06.FR.13**
Precondition: E06.FR.12
When dropping meter data, the Charging Station SHALL drop intermediate
values first (2nd value, 4th value, 6th etc), not drop the start and end values
from the list.

**E06.FR.14**
Precondition: When a TransactionEventRequest has to
be created
The Charging Station SHALL set the message’s seqNo field as specified in
Sequence Number Generation. (Same as E01.FR.07)

**E06.FR.15**
Precondition: When sending a TransactionEventRequest
The Charging Station SHALL set the triggerReason to inform the CSMS
about what triggered the event. What reason to use is described in the
description of TriggerReasonEnumType. (Same as E01.FR.15)

**E06.FR.16**
Precondition: A transaction was stopped by an
Abnormal Error or Fault Condition.
The Charging Station SHALL send TransactionEventRequest(eventType =
Ended, triggerReason=AbnormalCondition) to the CSMS.
